profile.name: Sanju Chowdhury
profile.title: MBA Candidate (Technology Management) | Aspiring Strategy Consulting & APM | 0→1 Builder
profile.focus: Building enterprise product strategy and data-driven GTM execution.
profile.summary: MBA candidate in Technology Management (IPL Bengaluru) with 1+ years building enterprise product strategy and data-driven GTM execution across India’s AI/tech ecosystem.

experience.description: Contributed to the deployment of 10+ core product features, addressed and resolved 50+ application issues, and closely adhered to Agile Scrum practices to facilitate seamless team workflows.
bulletPoints: Worked under the mentorship of 5+ senior engineers, contributing to the development and maintenance of 10+ application features across client projects.
Assisted in debugging and resolving 50+ software issues, improving application stability and reducing support escalations.
Collaborated in 20+ code reviews and sprint planning sessions, gaining hands-on experience in Agile development and industry best practices.
Supported API integration and database operations for 3+ projects, helping improve development efficiency and feature delivery timelines.

experience.description: Developed cross-platform applications for a US-based travel startup.
bulletPoints: Engineered cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart, ensuring a responsive user experience across iOS and Android.
Designed and integrated high-performance RESTful APIs using C# .NET to manage travel booking and user account systems.
Collaborated in an agile remote environment, delivering updates in two-week sprint cycles to speed up feature release.

experience.description: Designed analytics dashboards leading to a 40% reduction in manual tracking efforts. Restructured and optimized critical APIs, yielding a 25% system performance gain.
bulletPoints: Designed and developed asset monitoring modules handling data from 1,000+ tracked assets, improving real-time visibility for enterprise users.
Built analytics dashboards that reduced manual reporting effort by 40% and enabled operational decision-making.
Implemented backend APIs and database optimizations, improving data retrieval performance by 25% across asset management workflows.
Automated asset status reporting and alert mechanisms, reducing incident response time by 35% and improving operational efficiency.

experience.company: Retail Scan Management Services Pvt. Ltd.
experience.description: Foundation in market dynamics and growth-oriented strategies.
bulletPoints: Identified new market opportunities and strategic growth areas through deep competitive intelligence and market research.
Formulated targeted outreach strategies and pitched product solutions to mid-market enterprise clients.
Collaborated with client success and product teams to translate client feedback into actionable feature requests.

projects.title: Karigold
projects.description: A pioneering D2C gold jewelry digital platform that directly maps verified certified karigars to modern retail customers.
bulletPoints: Identified trust and pricing inefficiencies in India's ₹5.5L+ Cr gold jewelry market through 100+ customer interactions and analysis of 6+ leading jewelry brands; designed a D2C model connecting customers directly with certified karigars.

Validated problem-solution fit through 50+ stakeholder interviews across customers, artisans, and retailers; defined product strategy, pricing model, and core features including HUID traceability, transparent pricing, and custom jewelry design.

projects.title: Nexus
projects.tagline: Product Lead | B2B SaaS | Skillathon – Value Proposition Design
projects.description: A robust B2B operations and event management platform targeting the complex MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, Exhibitions) sector. Awarded 1st Place at the IPL Skillathon.
bulletPoints: Identified fragmentation pain across India’s ₹10,000Cr+ MICE industry — built Nexus, a unified B2B event ops platform replacing WhatsApp-based coordination with centralized vendor SLA management and budget dashboards
Designed end-to-end product: value proposition, user journey maps, and GTM roadmap targeting mid-tier Indian event organisers; ranked 1st of 10 teams at IPL Skillathon, Value Proposition Design

projects.title: Parkhive
projects.description: An intelligent, sensor-driven parking management and slot booking system designed to reduce city traffic congestion and optimize space utility.
bulletPoints: Designed slot-allocation logic optimizing space utility rates by 22% across multi-story garages.
Implemented high-performance map visualizations displaying real-time occupancy status.

projects.title: My Fitness Pal
projects.description: A custom health analytics client cloning and enhancing the core fitness tracking, activity log, and calorie intake visualization flows.
bulletPoints: Developed responsive dashboard layout visualizing daily activity logs, heart rate variations, and weight goals.
Integrated interactive charts converting dietary intake logs into actionable macro-nutrient breakdowns.

projects.title: Anthill
projects.tagline: Product Manager | Team Feedback & Project Ops
projects.description: A collaborative workspace organizing project feedback loops, user story mapping, and agile sprint delivery status.
bulletPoints: Built backlog mapping boards consolidating feature request inputs and prioritizing based on custom RICE formulas.
Designed intuitive mobile previews for testing UI layouts and sharing stakeholder review reviews.

projects.title: Solar Grid
projects.description: An interactive, visual grid manager for analyzing solar panel layout density, solar capture rates, and energy generation output.
bulletPoints: Engineered layout canvas mapping solar panel alignment and shadow zones under multiple sunlight angles.
Calculated generation potential models estimating monthly electricity output dynamically based on sunlight conditions.

projects.title: Notion Case Study
projects.description: A comprehensive product teardown analyzing user onboarding friction and proposing dynamic team templates to lift day-7 cohort activation.
bulletPoints: Evaluated the first-mile onboarding flow to locate drop-off steps where workspace template discovery fails.
Designed interactive template prompts to guide new workspaces toward collaborative documentation setup.

projects.title: Starbucks Case Study
projects.description: UX research study examining the Starbucks mobile ordering loop, identifying cognitive load friction points, and proposing UX layout updates.
bulletPoints: Conducted cognitive walkthroughs of the custom drink personalization drawer to reduce order path drop-offs.
Prototyped simplified payment flow models integrating instant-loyalty reward tracking modules.

projects.title: Blinkit Case Study
projects.description: GTM strategy detailing expansion models into tier-2 cities, optimizing dark store delivery routes, and pricing loops.
bulletPoints: Structured logistics deployment models analyzing optimal geographic placement parameters for sub-10 minute dark stores.
Drafted product roadmap features for dynamic bundling models to increase average order values in low-density zones.
